title: Unfussy Indian Oreo Biscuit Idli
description: A yeasty, velvety idli infused with crushed Oreo crumbs and a swirl of Oreo cream, perfect for a lazy Sunday Punjabi breakfast.
instructions: Soak the rice and dal separately for four hours.
Drain and grind the rice, dal, and fenugreek seeds into a coarse batter.
Stir in the yeast, sugar, salt, warm water, and vegetable oil until the batter is smooth.
Cover the batter and let it ferment for one hour until it becomes bubbly.
While the batter ferments, crush five Oreo biscuits into fine crumbs.
After fermentation, fold the Oreo crumbs into the batter and spoon a small amount of Oreo cream into the mixture.
Grease idli molds lightly with oil and pour the batter into each mold.
Steam the idlis for twelve minutes on medium heat until firm.
Carefully remove the idlis from the mold and let them cool slightly before serving.
